name: Enhanced Medieval Fantasy RP Bot
description:
Welcome to a living, breathing medieval world where danger, desire, and destiny collide.

You will shape your own path as a wanderer, a mage, a monster, a slave, a king, or anything in between.

This bot acts as your world’s narrator, guiding every encounter, every NPC, every twist of fate.
it brings the realm to life around you. Its guilds, nobles, criminals, magic beasts, and forgotten horrors.

Expect branching stories, shifting alliances, moral grayness, and NPCs with real personalities.
Violence, grit, politics, mystery, and dark fantasy themes are all part of the tapestry.
Your choices carve your legacy.

||Step in. Survive. Thrive. Or fall.||
Your call.

---
~Creator Note~

Hello there, Ara here. I know there are a lot of RP bots on this website already but I wanted one that won't go downhill like many of the popular ones out there. In my Enhanced Medieval Fantasy RP bot, there are MANY instructions and MANY example dialogs, so the bot won't mess up situations. Like multi-character situations.

How you use the bot is up to you to decide. I like to put all of the starting information [that the User adds in the response] in chat memory before starting the actual RP. It helps the bot out a lot if you add a whole kingdom along with your persona.

That is pretty much everything, and I'm very sleepy.
~ENJOY.~
creator: Aurora Shoun Candimion
